top_signals.title: Anglo-Eastern Furthers Greek Presence with Strengthened Leadership Commitment
top_signals.summary: Anglo-Eastern Univan Group (Anglo-Eastern), a global leader in independent ship management services, has strengthened its presence in Greece.This commitment is reflected in closer engagement between Anglo‑Eastern’s global leadership and its team serving the Greek market.
